ctaBand.label: Ready when you are
ctaBand.headline: Stop paying for the

faq.label: Questions
faq.headline: Asked &
faq.description: The clarifications operators tend to want before signing up.

items.question: Do you support both EU and Middle-East regulations?
items.answer: Yes. The data plane runs in two regions (EU + ME) with per-jurisdiction tax + e-invoicing rules (Peppol, KSeF, ZATCA, German Steuer rules).

items.question: How long does onboarding take?
items.answer: A finance team typically goes live in under a week. Most of that is importing existing contractors via CSV; the system itself sets up in minutes.

items.question: Can our auditor get read-only access?
items.answer: Yes. Read-only seats are free. Every action is signed + timestamped, so the export is the audit.

items.question: What happens to my data if we churn?
items.answer: A one-click export gives you every contract, invoice and payment as CSV + PDF. We delete the rest after 30 days.

items.question: Do you really cost less than a spreadsheet?
items.answer: Spreadsheets are free. The hours your finance team spends in them are not. We replace ~6h per finance hire per week — that is the implicit price.

integrationsGrid.label: Plays well with
integrationsGrid.headline: Connects to the tools your
integrationsGrid.description: Bank feeds, accounting suites, communication, e-invoicing networks. Replace nothing.

testimonials.label: Voices
testimonials.headline: What operators
testimonials.description: Finance leaders running 5–50 contractors who switched from spreadsheets and email.

items.quote: Onboarding a new subcontractor went from a half-day spreadsheet ceremony to a five-minute form.
items.author: Anna Kowalska

items.quote: Invoice approvals stopped being a Slack thread. We close the month two days earlier.
items.author: Markus Becker

items.quote: Every audit since switching has been one export. The Steuerberater stopped emailing back.
items.author: Yousef Al-Rashid

items.quote: Multi-region tax used to need a consultant. Now it is a dropdown.
items.author: Sofia Pereira

meta.title: Contractor Ops — B2B Contractor Management for EU Companies

meta.ogDescription: Stop juggling Excel, Slack, email and bank transfers. One system for your entire contractor lifecycle.

hero.subheadline: Contracts, invoices, approvals and payments for your B2B contractors — one system, zero chaos. Built for EU companies.

problem.label: The problem
problem.headline: Your contractor ops live in
problem.description: Every company with 5-50 B2B contractors knows this pain. You're stitching together tools that were never designed to work together.

pains.excel: Contractor list & rates scattered across multiple spreadsheets nobody owns
pains.email: Invoices buried in inboxes — lost, duplicated, or sitting unmatched for weeks
pains.slack: "Who was supposed to approve this?" — no ownership, no audit trail
pains.drive: Contracts, NDAs and IP docs scattered — nothing linked, nothing enforced
pains.bank: Manual payments — missed deadlines, duplicate wires, zero reconciliation
pains.nowhere: Offboarding doesn't exist — access stays open, IP docs never signed

features.label: Features
features.headline: One system for your entire
features.description: From the first contract signature to the final offboarding checklist. Every step tracked, every approval audited, every payment reconciled.

contracts.title: Contracts & docs
contracts.description: Template-driven contracts with e-sign, version tracking, and automatic renewal alerts. Every document linked to the contractor profile.

onboarding.title: Automated onboarding
onboarding.description: Configurable checklists with ownership, deadlines, and compliance gates. Contractors self-serve. You just approve.

invoices.title: Invoice matching
invoices.description: Auto-pull invoices, match to contracts and rates, flag discrepancies. No more hunting through email.

approvals.title: Approval workflows
approvals.description: Multi-step approval chains with clear ownership, SLA tracking, and full audit trail. No more 'who approved this?'

payments.title: Batch payments
payments.description: Export approved invoices as batch payment files. Reconcile automatically. One click, all contractors paid.

offboarding.title: Clean offboarding
offboarding.description: Structured exit flow — NDA sign-off, IP transfer, access revocation checklists. Nothing falls through the cracks.

compliance.title: Compliance & audit
compliance.description: Every action timestamped and attributed. Full audit trail for internal reviews, inspections, and legal requirements.

analytics.title: Spend analytics
analytics.description: Real-time dashboards showing contractor spend, budget burn rate, and cost breakdowns by team, project, or period.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.headline: Five steps from
howItWorks.description: Replace six disconnected tools with one unified flow. Each step feeds the next — no copy-pasting, no dropped balls.

onboard.title: Onboard
onboard.description: Add a contractor, assign a checklist. They self-serve their data, upload docs, and sign contracts via e-sign.

contract.title: Contract
contract.description: Generate contracts from templates. Automatic renewal tracking, amendment history, and version control.

invoice.title: Invoice
invoice.description: Invoices pulled automatically. Matched to contracts and rate cards. Discrepancies flagged instantly.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: Route invoices through your approval chain. Every action logged with timestamp and approver identity.

pay.title: Pay
pay.description: Batch-export approved invoices for payment. Automatic reconciliation when payments clear. Done.
